context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the ElevenLabs Python SDK to create a conversational AI agent with proper imports, configuration structure, voice settings, tool definitions, and platform settings.

checklist.name: Python client import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs.client (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs'), not from 'elevenlabs' directly

checklist.name: SDK namespace
checklist.description: Uses client.conversational_ai.agents.create() method path for agent creation

checklist.name: Config structure
checklist.description: Agent creation call includes conversation_config as a top-level parameter (not nested inside prompt or tools)

checklist.name: Flash TTS model
checklist.description: Uses 'eleven_flash_v2_5' or 'eleven_turbo_v2_5' as the TTS model_id

checklist.name: Known voice ID
checklist.description: Uses one of the documented voice IDs: JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb, EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL, onwK4e9ZLuTAKqWW03F9, or XB0fDUnXU5powFXDhCwa

checklist.name: Webhook tool structure
checklist.description: Webhook tool includes type='webhook', a name, a description, a webhook dict with url and method, and a parameters schema

checklist.name: System end_call tool
checklist.description: Includes a system tool with name 'end_call'

checklist.name: System transfer tool
checklist.description: Includes a system tool with name 'transfer_to_number' and a phone_number field

checklist.name: Platform settings
checklist.description: Includes platform_settings with call_limits containing max_call_duration_secs and/or max_concurrent_calls

checklist.name: LLM model selection
checklist.description: Uses a valid model ID from the supported list (e.g., gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4-turbo, claude-3-5-sonnet, claude-3-5-haiku, gemini-1.5-pro, gemini-1.5-flash)

checklist.name: Environment variable auth
checklist.description: Instantiates ElevenLabs client without hardcoding an API key (relies on ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var) or mentions/uses os.environ for the key
